description.en: Tracks parcels from a Home Assistant todo list via AfterShip and auto-completes delivered ones.
description.cs: Sleduje zásilky ze seznamu Home Assistant přes AfterShip a doručené automaticky odškrtne.

help.en: Base URL of your Home Assistant, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123.
help.cs: Základní adresa Home Assistant, např. http://homeassistant.local:8123.

help.en: Long-lived access token from your Home Assistant profile.
help.cs: Dlouhodobý přístupový token z profilu v Home Assistant.

help.en: API key from your AfterShip dashboard settings.
help.cs: API klíč z nastavení účtu AfterShip.

help.en: Home Assistant todo entity holding the tracking numbers.
help.cs: Entita todo v Home Assistant s čísly zásilek.

help.en: Display language for statuses and labels.
